statement: I build AI systems that make GTM and RevOps teams independent of the SaaS vendors they used to pay for.
bio: At Sigma Computing, I work directly with the CMO, COO, and CEO to replace external tools — pipeline intelligence platforms, deal management software, reporting automation — with warehouse-native AI built on Snowflake and Sigma. My systems don't supplement the existing stack. They replace it.

whatIBuild.title: Pipeline & forecast intelligence
whatIBuild.outcome: Live forecasts pulled straight from the warehouse

whatIBuild.title: Slack-native AI agents
whatIBuild.outcome: Deal ops that run inside Slack, not another tab

whatIBuild.title: Warehouse-native CRM tooling
whatIBuild.outcome: CRM logic that lives where the data already is

whatIBuild.title: Internal AI frameworks
whatIBuild.outcome: Reusable playbooks so AI work compounds, not repeats
